lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is there a Shantay Pass here?

lines.speaker: Shantay Guard
lines.text: There's been an influx of new business to these ruins. Shantay sent us out here to make some money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shantay once told me that he's not interested in profit!

lines.speaker: Shantay Guard
lines.text: Have you seen the state of this place? We're helping to provide vital repair costs to the people!

lines.speaker: Shantay Guard
lines.text: Not really our fault if they spend their cut on fancy outfits!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I see what you have to sell please?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to buy a Shantay pass for 5 gold coins.

lines.speaker: Shantay Guard
lines.text: Sorry friend, the Shantay Pass is 5 gold coins. You don't seem to have enough money!
